description_long: This snowman is constructed from three stacked, spherical snowballs of decreasing size from bottom to top, forming a classic snowman shape. Its body is adorned with three black buttons running vertically down the front, and its head features two coal-like black eyes and a pointed orange carrot nose. A red scarf is wrapped around its neck, adding a splash of color and warmth to its appearance. The snowman wears a black top hat with a red band, giving it a festive and traditional look. The surface appears smooth and slightly matte, typical of compacted snow, with accessories made to resemble fabric and coal. No arms or limbs are present, and the snowman stands upright, ready to greet passersby in an urban winter setting.
description: A classic three-tiered snowman with a black top hat, red scarf, coal eyes, carrot nose, and black buttons, standing upright and festive.
description_view_0: Front view showing the snowman's face, scarf, buttons, and top hat clearly.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the protruding carrot nose and the profile of the scarf and hat.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the snowman with no facial features or buttons visible, only the scarf and hat band.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the carrot nose and scarf from the other profile.
